response.original_title: そい見ちゃん＃1 桃乃木かな
response.overview: This program brings you a brand new and unprecedented concept where sexy actresses watch their own works and provide commentary and explanations of their performances! For the memorable first episode of "Soi-mi-chan," we have the immensely popular Idea Pocket exclusive actress, Momono Kana! Momono Kana and female PR representative Tara will provide commentary and explanations of the highly talked-about new 4K release! Momono Kana, who says she "only watches sample videos of her own works," looks incredibly cute as she shyly watches her own performance (staff all stand up) Please enjoy it along with the film
response.tagline: I want to fall asleep watching this with you!
response.title: Soi-chan #1 Kana Momogi
